title: Login and reach dashboard with all core cards visible
description: Verifies a user can log in from the landing flow and reach the dashboard where all core advisor cards are rendered.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the option to log in
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify the user lands on the dashboard and the image upload, decision, profit, alerts, and mandi sections are displayed

title: Offline reload shows cached app shell
description: Verifies that after an initial online load, reloading the app while offline still loads the cached UI shell instead of a browser network error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the page to finish loading
Set the browser to offline mode
Reload the page
Verify the app UI loads from cache while offline

title: Register service worker on first visit
description: Verifies that visiting the landing page registers the service worker so the app can use offline caching thereafter.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the page to finish loading
Verify the app indicates the offline capability is enabled (e.g., service worker registered/ready indicator)

title: Detect disease from a valid leaf image and show diagnosis and severity
description: Verifies a farmer can upload a valid leaf image for analysis and receives a disease diagnosis and severity result on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Select a valid image file in the leaf image picker
Submit the selected image for analysis
Wait for the detection result to appear
Verify a disease diagnosis name and a severity value are displayed in the detection result

title: Market Recommendation card shows ranked mandi options with net profit estimates
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can view a ranked list of mandi recommendations with transport-adjusted net profit estimates.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the dashboard
Scroll to the Market Recommendation section
Verify a ranked list of mandi recommendations with net profit estimates is displayed

title: Choose Sell via FPO and see confirmation for selected mandi
description: Verifies that the user can choose the direct-sell option via FPO and sees a confirmation tied to the selected mandi.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the dashboard
Scroll to the Market Recommendation section
Choose the option to sell via FPO for a mandi recommendation
Verify a direct-sell confirmation is displayed for the selected mandi

title: Decision card shows score, risk, and recommendation text
description: Verifies the decision engine section displays a decision score, a risk level, and a recommendation that a farmer can read.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify the decision section displays a decision score, a risk level, and a recommendation text

title: Offline navigation to a previously visited public route works
description: Verifies that after the app shell is cached, navigating back to the landing route while offline still renders the landing UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the page to finish loading
Navigate to /login
Wait for the page to finish loading
Set the browser to offline mode
Navigate to /
Verify the landing page UI renders while offline

title: View Analytics dashboard KPIs and charts
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can open Analytics and see the KPI grid along with yield, profit, and disease charts.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the analytics page
Verify a KPI grid is displayed
Verify yield, profit, and disease charts are displayed

title: View Smart Alerts on dashboard
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can view Smart Alerts on the dashboard and that alert items are displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the dashboard
Scroll to the Smart Alerts section
Verify Smart Alerts are displayed as a list of alert items

title: Offline access to previously visited authenticated route gracefully blocks
description: Verifies that after visiting the dashboard once online, reopening it while offline results in a deterministic blocked/redirected state rather than a broken page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation control to open the dashboard
Wait for the page to finish loading
Set the browser to offline mode
Reload the page
Verify the user is blocked from the authenticated page via a redirect to login or a clear access-blocked offline state

title: Market Recommendation renders without blocking other dashboard cards
description: Verifies that the Market Recommendation card renders while the rest of the dashboard remains visible and usable.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the dashboard
Verify the dashboard shows multiple core cards including Market Recommendation

title: Profit simulation shows treated vs untreated and net comparison
description: Verifies the profit simulation section displays treated and untreated profit values along with a net comparison for decision-making.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify the profit simulation section displays treated profit, untreated profit, and a net profit comparison

title: FPO selection persists within the current dashboard session
description: Verifies that after selecting Sell via FPO, the dashboard continues to show the selected state during the current session without resetting.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the dashboard
Scroll to the Market Recommendation section
Choose the option to sell via FPO for a mandi recommendation
Scroll away to another dashboard section and then return to the Market Recommendation section
Verify the UI still shows the direct-sell selection state for the chosen mandi

title: Navigate from dashboard to analytics and view metrics
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can move from the dashboard into analytics and successfully view analytics metrics and charts.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the dashboard
Click the link to open the analytics page
Verify a KPI grid is displayed
Verify yield, profit, and disease charts are displayed

title: Read aloud plays recommendation using speech synthesis when available
description: Verifies requesting read-aloud triggers spoken playback for the displayed recommendation when speech synthesis is available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Request read aloud for the recommendation
Verify a read-aloud playing state or active speech indicator is shown for the recommendation

title: App remains usable after returning online from offline state
description: Verifies that switching from offline back to online recovers the app to a normal interactive state without requiring a full reset.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the page to finish loading
Set the browser to offline mode
Reload the page
Set the browser to online mode
Reload the page
Verify the app UI loads normally when back online

title: Smart Alerts render without blocking the rest of the dashboard
description: Verifies that the Smart Alerts section renders without preventing other dashboard cards from being visible and usable.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the dashboard
Verify the dashboard shows multiple core cards including Smart Alerts

title: Smart Alerts remain visible after other dashboard interactions
description: Verifies that Smart Alerts remain available and readable after the user interacts with other dashboard cards.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the dashboard
Scroll to the Market Recommendation section
Scroll back to the Smart Alerts section
Verify Smart Alerts are displayed as a list of alert items

title: Market Recommendation empty state is shown when no mandi results are available
description: Verifies that the Market Recommendation card shows an empty state when it has no recommendations to display.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the dashboard
Scroll to the Market Recommendation section
Verify an empty state for mandi recommendations is displayed

title: Offline navigation to not-yet-cached route is handled
description: Verifies that attempting to open a route that has not been visited/cached while offline results in a predictable offline fallback rather than a blank or broken screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the page to finish loading
Set the browser to offline mode
Navigate to /analytics
Verify an offline fallback or blocked state is shown instead of a broken page

title: Analytics charts remain visible when navigating within the page
description: Verifies that the Analytics page supports scrolling through KPIs and charts without charts disappearing or breaking.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the analytics page
Scroll to the yield chart section
Scroll to the profit chart section
Scroll to the disease chart section
Verify yield, profit, and disease charts are displayed

title: Reject unsupported file type for detection upload
description: Verifies the app prevents submitting a non-image or unsupported file for analysis and shows a validation error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Select a non-image or unsupported file type in the file picker
Submit the selected file for analysis
Verify an unsupported file type validation error is visible and no detection result is shown

title: Smart Alerts empty state is shown when no alerts are available
description: Verifies that the dashboard shows a clear empty state for Smart Alerts when there are no alert items to display.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the dashboard
Scroll to the Smart Alerts section
Verify an empty state for Smart Alerts is displayed

title: Analytics KPI grid is readable and contains multiple metrics
description: Verifies that the KPI grid shows multiple KPI values so the user can review current farm performance at a glance.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the analytics page
Verify the KPI grid displays multiple KPI metrics with values

title: Smart Alerts content is readable and not truncated to unusable state
description: Verifies that each Smart Alert item renders readable content so the user can understand what action is needed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the dashboard
Scroll to the Smart Alerts section
Verify each displayed alert item contains readable message content

title: Market Recommendation list supports scrolling through multiple results
description: Verifies that the user can access more than the first recommendation when the ranked mandi list contains multiple entries.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the dashboard
Scroll to the Market Recommendation section
Scroll within the recommendation list to view additional mandi entries if present
Verify multiple mandi recommendation entries are accessible in the list

title: Analytics page shows a clear empty state when there is no data
description: Verifies that if analytics data is not available in the UI, the page presents an empty state rather than a broken layout.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the analytics page
Verify an empty state is displayed for missing analytics data

title: Smart Alerts are shown in the dashboard primary language presentation
description: Verifies that Smart Alerts appear consistently formatted for the app’s primary presentation language so farmers can interpret them.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the dashboard
Scroll to the Smart Alerts section
Verify Smart Alerts text is displayed consistently and is readable
